/usr/bin/ar qc libreplay.a CMakeFiles/replay.dir/BlitBufferToDepthTexture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/replay.dir/Capture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/replay.dir/Deserialization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/replay.dir/Error.cpp.o CMakeFiles/replay.dir/ReadHead.cpp.o CMakeFiles/replay.dir/Replay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/replay.dir/CaptureWalker.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libreplay.a
